archived_reason: Google Takeout is heavyweight UX (user must request export, wait, download, then upload). Google Maps Saved Places lists have no public API — accessing them would require scraping, which violates ToS. The native map-first creation flow (M1 Phase 8) solves the same problem: search a location, create a listing. No batch import needed.
description: Import Google Maps Saved Places from Google Takeout CSV files as listings (archived — not feasible without scraping)
